name: test_should_datetime_into_date_time[datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})-{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42, timezone: 'Pacific/Honolulu'}-'1984-10-28T01:00:42-10:00[Pacific/Honolulu]']

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
parameters.value: {'other': "datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})", 'expression': "{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42, timezone: 'Pacific/Honolulu'}", 'result': "'1984-10-28T01:00:42-10:00[Pacific/Honolulu]'"}
